name: Hyperswitch
description: Open-source payments switch written in Rust that connects to multiple processors via a single unified API.

seo.title: Hyperswitch — Payments Orchestration
seo.meta_description: Hyperswitch: Open-source payments switch written in Rust that connects to multiple processors via a single unified API.

when_to_use: Open-source payments switch routing to multiple processors via unified API
Reducing Stripe lock-in by adding backup acquirer with Hyperswitch routing
Self-hosted payment orchestration in Rust for cost-sensitive fintech
Multi-processor failover and smart routing with full transaction visibility

pros: Open source under Apache 2.0 — fully self-hostable
Written in Rust for throughput and low latency
Single API across dozens of processors and APMs
No vendor lock-in on routing logic or data
cons: Enterprise features and SLAs gated in cloud tier
Rust talent pool thinner for contributions
review.verdict: Most credible open-source alternative to Primer or Payrails if you can operate Rust infra and have a platform team.
review.best_for: Engineering-led teams wanting full control of an orchestrator without paying per-transaction SaaS fees.
review.not_for: Small teams without DevOps capacity or those needing a fully managed, SaaS-only product.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Free/open-source — no commercial pricing, no HWM.
